instruction: Clarify what could be achieved through exploiting this vulnerability.
input: An improper neutralization of special elements used in an OS command ('OS Command Injection') vulnerability [CWE-78] in FortiSOAR IMAP connector version 3.5.7 and below may allow an authenticated attacker to execute unauthorized code or commands via a specifically crafted playbook
output: Exploiting this vulnerability could allow an attacker with valid credentials to bypass intended security measures and execute arbitrary commands or code, leading to system compromise or data breach.
